summary:
None of the retrieved studies directly associate circular RNAs with eye diseases; while related non-coding RNAs like miRNAs are mentioned, circular RNA itself appears nowhere among the findings. Thus, current literature provides insufficient support for linking circular RNAs to ophthalmic conditions.\boxed{B}
